channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iranian football team closely monitored at Gold Coast hotel amid safety concerns
item.description: Concerns have emerged over the safety and freedom of Iran's national football teams while in Australia. Sources visiting a Gold Coast hotel where the players are staying report that the team is under ...

item.title: David Prescott, son of former deputy PM, joins Green Party amid Labour decline
item.description: David Prescott, son of former Labour deputy prime minister John Prescott, joined the Green Party in October 2025, a year after his father's death. His decision follows a historic by-election victory f...

item.title: Chinese espionage targets Filipino personnel with access to Philippine Coast Guard operations
item.description: An investigative report by Rappler uncovered how Chinese nationals recruited Filipinos with access to sensitive Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) information in Palawan. From early 2024 to mid-2025, a Chin...

item.title: Media Focus on Sexual Scandals vs. Global War Crimes
item.description: The article critiques the disproportionate attention given by the media to alleged sexual misconduct by public figures such as Trump, particularly regarding underage individuals, while largely ignorin...

item.title: Alberta rental company faces charges over 2024 tent collapse that killed one person
item.description: Nearly two years after a tragic incident at the Westlock Meditation Centre northwest of Edmonton, Alberta, a special event rental company is now facing legal consequences. On July 31, 2024, a large ev...

item.title: Punjab government to establish anti-drone units in all districts for enhanced security
item.description: Punjab government has announced that it will establish anti-drone units in every district across the province to strengthen security and maintain law and order. The decision was approved by Chief Mini...

item.title: Knysna sports field upgrade stalled due to consulting and funding issues
item.description: The Bongani Phase 2 sports field upgrade in Knysna has faced significant delays, largely due to the termination of the consulting firm Kgosihadi Consulting, which failed to attend the site for months....

item.title: Impact of Iran Conflict Raises India's Crude Oil Price to $85 per Barrel
item.description: The ongoing conflict in Iran has caused significant upward pressure on global crude oil prices, impacting India's crude oil basket, which has risen to $85 per barrel. This marks a 19-month high for In...

item.title: Tanzania Promotes Clean Cooking Energy to Support Women and Economic Growth
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Dr Dorothy Gwajima, Minister for Community Development, Gender, Women and Special Groups, has emphasized that access to clean cooking energy is key for Tanzania’s economic growth and g...

item.title: MRT-3 conducts inspection and disinfection after commuter reports cockroaches
item.description: The MRT-3 management in Metro Manila conducted an immediate inspection and disinfection of one of its train cars after a commuter reported seeing small cockroaches. The issue came to light when a pass...

item.title: Kyle and Jackie O show cancelled after co-hosts’ fallout despite ACMA complaints
item.description: The Kyle and Jackie O Show, a long-running and controversial morning radio program on KIIS, has been cancelled by the Australian Radio Network (ARN) following an internal conflict between the hosts. O...

item.title: Vancouver Uber rider disputes cleaning fee for small pet, deletes app after refund
item.description: Karen Plangg, a Vancouver resident, was recently charged an unexpected $60 cleaning fee by Uber after bringing her small Yorkipoo on a ride for which she had selected the Uber Pet option. The total co...

item.title: Allegations of CAC Registrar-General Funelling Public Contract Funds Through Brother-in-Law
item.description: Investigations don show say Ishaq Hussaini Magaji, the Registrar-General of the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC), allegedly dey channel kickbacks from federal contracts through him brother-in-law, A...

item.title: Declining healthy life expectancy in the UK signals societal decline, linked to austerity and inequality
item.description: A recent Office for National Statistics report reveals that healthy life expectancy in the UK has fallen to its lowest level since records began in 2011, with a child born today expected to enjoy good...

item.title: Sustainable Paper Tube Chair Combines Upcycling and Minimalist Design
item.description: The Paper Tube Chair, created by the Dhammada Collective in Chandigarh, India, transforms industrial paper cores into a functional and aesthetically appealing piece of furniture. Made from 15 discarde...

item.title: British Nationals Return Home on First Government Flight from Middle East Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: British nationals have recounted their experiences travelling back to the UK on the first government-chartered flight from the Middle East since regional conflict escalated six days ago. Originally sc...

item.title: Rep. Tony Gonzales to Complete Current Term but Will Not Run for Re-election Following Ethics Probe
item.description: Rep. Tony Gonzales, a Republican from Texas, announced that he will not seek re-election following revelations of an extramarital affair with a former staffer and an ensuing House Ethics Committee inv...

item.title: Sauti za Busara Festival in Zanzibar Invites African Artists to Apply for 2027 Edition
item.description: The organisers of Sauti za Busara, one of the biggest music festivals in East Africa, have started accepting applications for musicians to perform at the 2027 edition. This popular event will happen i...

item.title: Legal and Political Dispute Over Linda Mwananchi Party Name in Kenya
item.description: The Linda Mwananchi Party of Kenya is at the centre of a heated legal and political dispute. Charles Wanyonyi, who applied to reserve the party name, is challenging objections from opposition leaders ...

item.title: Understanding the Role of Housing for Women-Headed Households in South Africa
item.description: Since 1994, South Africa has struggled to meet the demand for adequate housing, with the current national shortfall standing at around 2 million units despite delivering over 5 million homes and housi...
